title: Gas Price
content:
I've been keeping records of the gas price since the first day I've got the Accord (Jan'04). The graph looks really stunning but a lot less impressive when I pay for the fill up.

!https://macsfvent.sgp1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/media/misc/gas_price.png!

Talking about gas, the best my car can do is around 12 km/litre (usually when going out on a trip) with the average of 8 km/litre. I guess that's almost exactly the manual's figure.
